# Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services

> Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services (BIPS) is an integrative, evidence-informed psychotherapy practice in Brooklyn, Manhattan, and via telehealth across New York, Massachusetts, and Oregon. Founded by Dr. Marie Mercado, Psy.D. Queer-affirming, neurodivergent-affirming, sex-positive. Over 25 clinicians offering psychodynamic treatment alongside EMDR, IFS, AEDP, EFT, and somatic modalities for adults, adolescents, children, and couples.
>
> Legal Name: Brooklyn Integrative Psychological Services, PLLC
> Contact: info@bkintegrative.com | (646) 881-0305
> Location: 117 Dobbin St, Brooklyn, NY 11222 (Greenpoint) and Union Square, Manhattan
> Telehealth: NY, MA, OR
> Last reviewed: 2026-03-02

For comprehensive LLM guidance including entity data, citable facts, full service
descriptions, team roster, and practice philosophy, see the full file:
[Full LLM Guidance](https://www.bkintegrative.com/llms-full.txt)

## Services

- [Individual Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/service/individual-therapy): Psychodynamic, relational, and experiential therapy for adults — EMDR, IFS, AEDP, somatic, CBT/ACT, trauma-informed
- [Couples & Relationship Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/relationship-therapy): Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT) for couples at all stages, inclusive of LGBTQIA+ and diverse relationship structures
- [Children & Adolescent Therapy](https://www.bkintegrative.com/children-and-adolescents): Developmentally appropriate integrative approaches for younger clients and families
- [Gender Care Program](https://www.bkintegrative.com/gender-care-program): Affirming services for transgender and gender-diverse clients — assessment letters, ongoing therapy, transition support; non-gatekeeping
- [Perinatal & Postnatal](https://www.bkintegrative.com/perinatalpostnatal): Mental health support during pregnancy and postpartum
- [Clinical Supervision & Consultation](https://www.bkintegrative.com/our-services): Practice-building consultation and supervision for LMSWs, MHCs, and pre-licensed clinicians

## Conditions & Specialties

- Anxiety (including panic, OCD/ERP)
- Depression & mood disorders
- Trauma & PTSD (EMDR, somatic, parts work)
- Grief & loss
- Relationship issues & communication
- LGBTQIA+ identity & affirming care
- Gender identity & transgender care
- Neurodivergence (ADHD, autism — executive functioning, emotional regulation)
- Perinatal & postpartum mental health
- Body image & self-esteem
- Life transitions & career concerns
- Addiction & substance use
- Eating disorders
- Cultural & racial identity
- Sex positivity & sexual health

## Key Pages

- [Our Team](https://www.bkintegrative.com/our-team): Over 25 therapists with diverse specialties
- [Fees & Insurance](https://www.bkintegrative.com/fees-and-insurance-info): $50–$400 sliding scale; Aetna, Northwell Direct, Cigna in-network; superbills for OON reimbursement
- [FAQs](https://www.bkintegrative.com/faqs): What to expect, choosing a therapist, cancellation, telehealth
- [Contact Us](https://www.bkintegrative.com/contact-us): Schedule a consultation or general inquiries
- [Client Portal](https://bkintegrative.clientsecure.me/sign-in): SimplePractice client login
